affection_vs_conflict.label: Affection vs Conflict
affection_vs_conflict.notes: Main hypothesis axis for whether intimacy language drifts toward tenderness or pain / breakup framing.

romance_vs_desire.label: Romance vs Desire/Sexuality
romance_vs_desire.notes: Separates affectionate/relational framing from more bodily or desire-driven framing.

permanence_vs_transience.label: Permanence vs Transience
permanence_vs_transience.notes: Temporal-stability axis. This one is likely to need coverage-driven pruning because some anchors may be too rare in lyrics.
